title: Volcanic Evolution
description: A mod that adds new ores, armors and weapons each with interesting properties...
body: # Volcanic Evolution ![Affiliate](https://i.imgur.com/1O8Piaf.png)\ A mod developed quite some time ago whose goal is to add new ores, armors, tools, and weapons to the game, mainly centered around a volcanic/fire theme. The mod currently adds: - a new dimension (accessible only in creative at the moment) - two new ores, amethyst ore and volcanic ore, each with their own block and ingot (amethyst has an additional item, the amethyst gem) - a total of 12 new armors/weapons/tools, spread across each ore _NB: This mod is no longer in development and is only available for versions 1.12-1.12.2_
